_discipline: Patterns land here ONLY after Curio's own analytics (or >=2 independent outliers + review) support them. Each needs id, pattern, guidance, evidence[], promotedAt. Loaded into every generation prompt.

patterns.guidance: Full-screen title + 5-8 numbered list items; video shorter than read time so viewers pause/screenshot/save. Items must each carry a keepable insight; one emphasis phrase per item; premium type, no clutter.
evidence: yt:cgLQdjDG4lc (8 Hard Truths, 332K views, 63x breakout, 5s static)
